---
title: "Abhinav Chand"
image: assets/upload.jpg
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 200px
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/chand-ab
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/abc2421412/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:chandab@uwec.edu
---

I am an Assistant Professor in the Mathematics Department at the University of Wisconsin-Eau Claire. I teach data 
science and mathematics courses. 

Currently teaching:

* DS 150 Computing in Python: Fundamentals and Procedural Programming
* DS 740 Data Mining & Machine Learning

My current research interests are as follows:

* Network Science
* Graph Neural Networks
* Machine learning
* Mechanistic Interpretability

Teaching philosophy TLDR:

* Develop the habit of learning from first principles  
* Motivate everything
* Well motivated and engaging active learning problem sets with appropriate scaffolding 
([TILT](https://www.tilthighered.com/){target="_blank"})   
* Students build things that they are passionate about through mini-projects and capstone projects    
* A functional and affordable AI tutor       
* Teaching stack: [Mentimeter](https://www.mentimeter.com/){target="_blank"}, 
[Manim](https://www.manim.community/){target="_blank"}, 
[Nbgrader](https://nbgrader.readthedocs.io/en/stable/){target="_blank"}, 
[markdown2canvas](https://ofloveandhate.github.io/markdown2canvas/){target="_blank"}, 
[codeshare](https://codeshare.io/){target="_blank"}
